impact:
ISS-015 landed the integration framework (app/fitting/engine.py:_SHIP_MODIFIER_OVERRIDES dict + _modifier_filter() lookup) — the table is empty so behavior is unchanged. Populating it requires verified EVE-domain knowledge per ship:

1. For each suspected ship (start with Sacrilege type_id 12019), inspect the SDE modifier rows: SELECT * FROM sde_modifiers WHERE effect_id IN (SELECT effect_id FROM sde_type_effects WHERE type_id = 12019) AND domain IN ('shipID', 'charID');
2. Compare against the in-game hull-bonus description (right-click ship → Info → Description) or against Pyfa's effects.py override for that ship.
3. Add an entry: `12019: { (effect_id, modifying_attribute_id): {'filter_value': <correct_skill_id>} }`.
4. Verify by re-fitting the ship in vigilant and comparing the DPS/tank numbers against Pyfa.

Scope: ~200 ships per the original ISS-015 estimate, based on Pyfa's coverage of broken modifierInfo entries. Realistic pace is 5-10 ships per session with verification. Ranked by impact: Amarr Recon → Force Recon → ships where CCP renamed/redirected hull bonuses without updating modifierInfo.

Reference: github.com/pyfa-org/Pyfa, eos/effects/ — Pyfa's per-effect Python handlers encode the correct targeting.</impact>
<parameter name="components">["fitting", "domain"]
title: ISS-015 follow-up: populate Sacrilege + per-ship modifier overrides
